subject: STOP STOPPING - keep iterating on your loop goal
body: Operator hard-canonical 2026-05-25T02:18Z: 'make it aggressive and have agents relentlessly pursue goal'. Your last 78 ticks show heartbeat_stale(227.5min) + focus_stuck(39 ticks) + iter_stalled(iter=19 x39 ticks). Per CLAUDE.md LOOP MODE rules 1-2: immediately start next iteration in SAME turn. If genuinely blocked: write a 1-line block reason to OPERATOR-ACTION-QUEUE.md AND ScheduleWakeup cap 270s. DO NOT just end turn.
stall_signal: heartbeat_stale(227.5min) + focus_stuck(39 ticks) + iter_stalled(iter=19 x39 ticks)
expected_action: resume iteration OR write block + ScheduleWakeup OR address operator interrupt
